suppress.notes: Temporary Suppressions CVE-2025-7962 - May be a false positive as angus_mail does not appear in dependency list CVE-2025-15104 - May be a false positive as Nu HTML checker does not appear in dependency list CVE-2025-48976 - See CRF-21 CVE-2026-41284 - See CRF-28 CVE-2026-41293 - See CRF-28 CVE-2026-41840 - See CRF-29 CVE-2026-41841 - See CRF-29 CVE-2026-41842 - See CRF-29 CVE-2026-41843 - See CRF-29 CVE-2026-41850 - See CRF-29 CVE-2026-41851 - See CRF-29 CVE-2026-42498 - See CRF-28 CVE-2026-43512 - See CRF-28 CVE-2026-43513 - See CRF-28 CVE-2026-43514 - See CRF-28 CVE-2026-43515 - See CRF-28
